diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
 import math

 

 class SAKT(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, num_skills, max_seq_len, d_model=256, n_heads=8, n_layers=3, dropout=0.3):

+    def __init__(self, num_skills, max_seq_len, d_model=192, n_heads=8, n_layers=3, dropout=0.35):

         super().__init__()

         self.d_model = d_model

         self.num_skills = num_skills

@@ -17,6 +17,10 @@
         self.correct_emb = nn.Embedding(2, d_model)

         self.pos_emb = nn.Embedding(max_seq_len, d_model)

         self.start_emb = nn.Parameter(torch.zeros(1, d_model))

+        

+        # Per-skill difficulty bias

+        self.difficulty = nn.Embedding(num_skills, 1)

+        nn.init.zeros_(self.difficulty.weight)

         

         self.emb_dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

         self.emb_norm = nn.LayerNorm(d_model)

@@ -70,7 +74,7 @@
         

         x = self.emb_norm(self.emb_dropout(skill_embeddings + correct_embeddings + pos_embeddings))

         

-        # Causal mask: position t can see positions 0..t (diagonal=1 means block j>i)

+        # Causal mask: position t can see positions 0..t

         causal_mask = torch.triu(torch.ones(T, T, device=device), diagonal=1).bool()

         

         # Padding mask: True = masked (don't attend)

@@ -86,4 +90,7 @@
         

         logits = self.fc(x).squeeze(-1)  # [B, T]

         

+        # Add per-skill difficulty bias

+        logits = logits + self.difficulty(skill_ids).squeeze(-1)

+        

         return logits

--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -33,17 +33,26 @@
     corrects = test_data['corrects'].to(device)

     lengths = test_data['lengths'].to(device)

     

+    # Predict in batches to avoid OOM

+    batch_size = 128

+    all_probs = []

+    

     with torch.no_grad():

-        logits = model(skill_ids, corrects, lengths)

-        pred_logits = logits[:, 1:]

-        probs = torch.sigmoid(pred_logits)

-    

-    T = corrects.shape[1]

-    mask = torch.arange(T - 1, device=device).unsqueeze(0) < (lengths.unsqueeze(1) - 1)

-    predictions = probs[mask].cpu().tolist()

+        for i in range(0, skill_ids.shape[0], batch_size):

+            batch_skills = skill_ids[i:i+batch_size]

+            batch_corrects = corrects[i:i+batch_size]

+            batch_lengths = lengths[i:i+batch_size]

+            

+            logits = model(batch_skills, batch_corrects, batch_lengths)

+            pred_logits = logits[:, 1:]

+            probs = torch.sigmoid(pred_logits)

+            

+            T_b = batch_corrects.shape[1]

+            mask = torch.arange(T_b - 1, device=device).unsqueeze(0) < (batch_lengths.unsqueeze(1) - 1)

+            all_probs.extend(probs[mask].cpu().tolist())

     

     with open(args.output, 'w') as f:

-        json.dump({'predictions': predictions}, f)

+        json.dump({'predictions': all_probs}, f)

 

 if __name__ == '__main__':

     main()

         num_skills=num_skills, max_seq_len=max_seq_len,

+    print(f'Positive rate: {pos_rate:.4f}')

     

-    criterion = nn.BCEWithLogitsLoss(pos_weight=torch.tensor([pos_weight_val]).to(device))

-    optimizer = torch.optim.AdamW(model.parameters(), lr=3e-4, weight_decay=0.01)

+    criterion = nn.BCEWithLogitsLoss()

+    optimizer = torch.optim.AdamW(model.parameters(), lr=2e-4, weight_decay=0.05)

     

-    epochs = 80

+    epochs = 30

     warmup_epochs = 5

     batch_size = 64

     

@@ -65,7 +65,6 @@

             targets = correct_batch[:, 1:]

                 'dropout': dropout,

             }, 'checkpoints/best.pt')
